footer.tagline: Made with sourdough and lots of love.

hero.title: Natural bread and cookies, no preservatives and with real ingredients.
hero.subtitle: In Dallas, finding quality artisanal bread and desserts made with real ingredients is a challenge… until our Güerita arrived.
hero.description: Our cookies, made with sourdough, have a complexity and depth of flavor that makes them unique. Our rustic breads go through a natural fermentation of over 20 hours.

scarcity.title: Artisanal production in small batches.
scarcity.text: Don't miss out on your sourdough bread and cookies.
scarcity.highlight: If you blink, you'll miss your Sourdough.

events.title: For your events
events.text: Have a special dinner or gathering? We customize our cookie and loaf boxes to give your event the unique artisanal touch of Pásele Güerita.

business.title: For your business
business.label: Wholesale
business.text: Bring the magic of our sourdough to your café or restaurant. We offer wholesale pricing for business partners seeking superior quality.

testimonials.quote: "From Farmersville Texas, we share this little piece of tradition and conscious flavor. For Dallas and surrounding areas."

items.text: The first bread in years that doesn't bloat me. The Matcha cookies are spectacular.
items.author: — Mariana L., Uptown

items.text: Worth every penny. You can taste the love and the 24-hour fermentation. I'm never going back to store-bought bread.
items.author: — Roberto C., Oak Cliff

gallery.caption: From the oven to your heart

contact.title: Write to us
contact.subtitle: At our oven, we believe the best decisions are the ones that nourish the soul.

subscriptions.title: Weekly Subscriptions
subscriptions.text: Ask about our subscriptions: we deliver your sliced bread at no extra cost.

menu.title: Full Menu
menu.heading: Our Menu
menu.subtitle: We bake small batches every week. Pick your favorites and get them fresh in Dallas.

cartDrawer.title: Your Order
cartDrawer.footnote: Deliveries Saturdays in Dallas and surrounding areas. Check availability in the next step.

checkoutPage.title: Place your order
checkoutPage.subtitle: We bake to order to guarantee freshness.

empty.title: Your basket is empty
empty.subtitle: Add cookies or bread to start your order.

soldOut.title: Sold out for today!
soldOut.subtitle: We reached today's order limit. We'll open the next round soon. Follow us on Instagram to be the first to know!

step1.title: Your Delivery
step1.subtitle: Choose your pickup point.
step1.specialDescription: If you're in any of these areas, select this option and we'll let you know the days we can coordinate your delivery.

step2.title: When?
step2.specialMessage: We'll get in touch with you to coordinate the best delivery date and time for your area.

step3.title: Customize
step3.subtitle: Pick your flavors and add extras from the oven.
step3.extraCookiesNote: Pick the box size. You'll be able to customize flavors in the section above.
step3.fillBoxesWarning: Please fill all your boxes with flavors before continuing

step4.title: Your Info
step4.recipeNote: You'll receive your recipe by email.

step5.title: Payment
step5.scanCode: Scan the code or send your payment to the number above.

success.title:
Thank you for
your order!
success.subtitle: We're preparing the best of our oven for you.

productDetail.promoCustomize: You'll be able to customize and mix the flavors of your box in the next step.
productDetail.wantSliced: Would you like the bread sliced?
productDetail.defaultDescription: Treat yourself to the best of our artisanal bakery. Made fresh every day with the highest quality ingredients and a slow fermentation process that guarantees unmatched flavor.

allergens.title: Important health information:
allergens.body: Contains gluten (wheat). Our products are made in an artisanal kitchen that also processes walnuts, peanuts, almonds, and seeds. If you have a severe allergy, please contact us via WhatsApp before placing your order.

care.frozenBread: Up to 2 months. Slice before freezing.
